intro: Pseudoeriosema bequaertii, commonly known as bequaert's eriosema, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various infections and diseases.
